name: Pumpkin or Squash Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/4 cups cooked pumpkin or winter squash, mashed
9 inch fat free, pre baked pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Combine all ingredients except pie crust in a blender. Pulse until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prebaked pie crust.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F (220°C). Lower the heat to 250°F (121°C) and bake another 1 1/4 hours.
5. Makes 10 servings.
